title: Why Aren't Businesses Using AI Agents Yet? Experts Explain! #shorts
summary: Agentic AI adoption is slow because the technology is still immature, similar to early LLM adoption stages. Businesses are in a competitive race to leverage this emerging capability.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof addresses why businesses have not widely deployed AI agents yet, with experts pointing to the technology's immaturity as the primary barrier. The video draws a parallel between current agentic AI adoption and the early stages of LLM adoption, framing both as nascent capabilities still finding their footing. The main takeaway is that despite the slow rollout, companies are in a competitive race to leverage this emerging capability.
